name: Dr. Emily Carter
title: DVM, Chief Veterinarian
bio: Dr. Carter has over 15 years of experience in small animal medicine. She leads our clinical team and is passionate about preventive care and building long-term relationships with patients and their families.

name: Dr. Jessica Lee
title: DVM, DABVP (Feline)
bio: Dr. Lee is our feline and exotic animal expert with board certification from the American Board of Veterinary Practitioners. She has a special interest in cat-friendly handling techniques and exotic species.

name: Dr. Marcus Reed
title: DVM, DACVS
bio: Dr. Reed is our lead surgeon with board certification in veterinary surgery. He specialises in orthopaedic procedures soft tissue surgery and minimally invasive techniques.

name: Dr. Sophia Nguyen
title: DVM, MS
bio: Dr. Nguyen completed her residency in veterinary dermatology and holds a Master's in clinical nutrition. She manages complex allergy cases skin disorders and nutritional consultations.

name: Dr. James Thornton
title: DVM
bio: Dr. Thornton joined PawClinic in 2020 with a focus on preventive medicine and community health. He is known for his gentle approach with anxious patients and thorough wellness consultations.

name: Dr. Priya Sharma
title: DVM, DACVIM (Oncology)
bio: Dr. Sharma is our oncology specialist helping pets and their families navigate cancer diagnoses with compassion and expertise. She coordinates closely with our diagnostic imaging team.
